---
title: "Vercel Blob (txt)"
description: "MCP-only template that stores private .txt blobs on Vercel Blob using UUID hex IDs"
---

<Info>**Source:** [`examples/with-vercel-blob`](https://github.com/AgentlyHQ/aixyz/tree/main/examples/with-vercel-blob)</Info>

## Overview

This template exposes a single MCP tool, `putTxt`, that writes **private** `.txt` files to Vercel Blob using `@vercel/blob`. IDs are generated as UUID hex strings (no base58) and each call is priced at `$0.001` via x402. There is **no** `app/agent.ts` — the server only serves `/mcp`.

## Project Structure

```
with-vercel-blob/
├── aixyz.config.ts             # Agent metadata + x402 config
├── app/
│   ├── icon.svg                # Template icon
│   └── tools/
│       ├── putTxt.ts           # MCP tool using @vercel/blob
│       └── putTxt.test.ts      # Deterministic helper tests
├── package.json
├── tsconfig.json
└── vercel.json
```

## Tool: `putTxt`

```typescript title="app/tools/putTxt.ts"
import { put } from "@vercel/blob";
import { tool } from "ai";

export default tool({
  description: "Store a private UTF-8 .txt file in Vercel Blob and return its URL and metadata.",
  inputSchema: z.object({
    text: z.string().min(1).max(50_000),
    folder: z.string().regex(/^[a-zA-Z0-9/_-]+$/).optional(), // default: txt/
    expiresInDays: z.number().int().min(1).max(365).optional(), // default: 365
  }),
  execute: async ({ text, folder, expiresInDays }) => {
    const plan = createTxtPlan({ folder, expiresInDays });
    const payload = [
      "# putTxt blob",
      `createdAt=${plan.createdAt.toISOString()}`,
      `expiresAt=${plan.expiresAt.toISOString()}`,
      "",
      text,
    ].join("\n");
    const blob = await put(plan.path, payload, {
      access: "private",
      contentType: "text/plain; charset=utf-8",
      addRandomSuffix: false,
      allowOverwrite: false,
      token: process.env.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN!,
    });
    return {
      id: plan.id,
      url: blob.url,
      path: plan.path,
      downloadUrl: blob.downloadUrl,
      createdAt: plan.createdAt.toISOString(),
      expiresAt: plan.expiresAt.toISOString(),
    };
  },
});
```

Key behaviors:

- **UUID hex IDs** — `crypto.randomUUID().replace(/-/g, "")`, stored at `folder/{id}.txt`
- **Metadata envelope** — prepends `createdAt` / `expiresAt` to the text body
- **Access control** — `access: "private"` + `allowOverwrite: false`
- **TTL** — default 365 days, clamped to 1-365 via `expiresInDays`

## Environment

Set a Vercel Blob read/write token before running locally:

```bash
echo 'BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN=...' >> .env.local
```

## Payment

`putTxt` charges `$0.001` per call using the x402 settings in `aixyz.config.ts` (Base mainnet in production, Base Sepolia in development).

## Running locally

```bash
cd examples/with-vercel-blob
bun install
bun run dev
```

Connect any MCP client (Claude Desktop, VS Code MCP extension, etc.) to `http://localhost:3000/mcp` and call `putTxt` with the schema above.
